title: Security: = prepended in document.cookie allows to bypass __Secure and __Host prefixes
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
document.cookie = "=__Host-test=a" allows one to set cookie with __Host-test=a  
  
**VERSION**   
Chrome Version: [103.0.5060.114]   
Operating System: Windows 10  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
1. Go to http://httpbin.org/headers and execute in console document.cookie
